properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Living under the Lambs shed blood As the star shines through the way I will take my stand with Jesus my Lord, Clinging to the Holy Word, Yielding all my life to Jesus, I will live under the blood.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Have you been restored Back to the holy faith Hear the voice, the bridegroom cometh, Have you seen the evening light.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Great rivers of joy in men And tears flow in my eyes The battle of flesh and spirit in me Treading on forsaken path It’s by faith I’ll trail to glory, Praying in the Holy Ghost.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I’ll yield my all to Christ My sword His Holy Word And my ladder and ark to float up above May He help me to obey Built upon apostles and prophets Jesus Christ the corner stone.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: When He comes to take me home I will sing the triumph song A home beyond my words to describe The Son of David reigning in the everlasting Kingdom We shall never part again.
